specificity.comment: units × ASP × 地区毛利 × 费用率,正常化桥非泛泛净利率拍脑袋

falsifiability.comment: H1/年报 wrong-if 清楚:出口量、海外毛利、净利率、OCF、国内收入均可查

valuation_discipline.comment: 正常化桥(units×ASP×地区GM−费用−税)足够注册 WATCH,但情景 PE/GM/销量仍是未校准假设(最弱轴)

information_increment.comment: 'PE 10 是顶部 EPS 便宜,不是真便宜'是强增量;cyclical_flag 把 ROE 35.9% 拆成相对自身历史的盈利顶(2.751×)

risk_identification.comment: OCF(0.576 vs TTM 0.966)、99.65% 分红压薄净资产、ROE 放大机制均处理诚实

conditions: register as forward-court WATCH only — NOT starter / NOT buy
FRAMING LOCK: peak-earnings NORMALIZATION thesis, NOT value — never state 'PE 10 / 9.6% 股息率' without 'on peak earnings / 基于顶部盈利' in the same sentence
core checkpoint = 2026 半年报 (出口销量 / 海外毛利 / 净利率 / 现金质量)
platform follow-up (NON-blocking): label universe ocf_to_ni as FY-anchor + TTM-aside (#100 no bug — this case proved TTM OCF/NI is single-quarter working-capital sensitive)

checklist.line_item_or_quote: FY2025 OCF ¥31.97亿 / 归母 ¥55.54亿 = OCF/NI 0.576 (−55.67% YoY); 扣非归母 ¥45.80亿 = 82.5% of 归母 (非经常性 ~17.5%); pipeline TTM 0.966 = Q1'26 营运资金窗口效应 (Q1'26 OCF 34.94亿 vs Q1'25 14.17亿), NOT operating leverage

checklist.source_title: FY2025 年报 §利润分配预案 + §资产负债表日后事项
checklist.line_item_or_quote: '每10股派息25元(含税)…现金分红5,534,848,057.50元…占归母99.65%'(利润分配预案表) = 中期10派5(¥11.07亿) + 末次10派20(¥44.28亿);日后事项的'10派20'是末次部分,非竞争全年口径

note: Core Thesis Factory v1 — FIRST clean-screen (post #99 momentum / #100 clean financials / #101 cyclical-flag) deep thesis. cyclical_flag peak_earnings_risk=True (ROE 2.751× its own 5y median) drove the normalization frame; a 2-pass fix-forward closed the OCF / dividend / normalized-bridge 口径 before PASS. Human score = measure of record per spec #62. Registered as forward-court WATCH, NOT a buy.
